mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_target ( target_id, coupon_id, partner_id, place_id, target_type, target_value, is_exclude ) VALUES ( coupon_target_seq.NEXTVAL, #{couponId}, #{partnerId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{placeId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{targetType}, #{targetValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isExclude} )
mapper.select: SELECT target_id AS targetId, coupon_id AS couponId, partner_id AS partnerId, place_id AS placeId, target_type AS targetType, target_value AS targetValue, is_exclude AS isExclude FROM coupon_target WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} ORDER BY is_exclude, target_type, target_id

SELECT a.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS name, a.accommodation_type AS accommodationType FROM accommodation a LEFT JOIN place p ON a.place_id = p.place_id
AND ( p.place_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR a.accommodation_type LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND a.accommodation_type = #{accommodationType}
ORDER BY p.place_name
SELECT DISTINCT accommodation_type FROM accommodation WHERE accommodation_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY accommodation_type

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM coupon_target ct WHERE ct.coupon_id = #{couponId} AND ct.is_exclude = 'Y' AND ( (ct.target_type = 'ACCOMMODATION' AND ct.place_id = #{placeId}) OR (ct.target_type = 'ROOM' AND ct.target_value = TO_CHAR(#{roomId})) OR (ct.target_type = 'ACC_TYPE' AND ct.target_value = #{accommodationType}) ) ) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END FROM dual
